comments.body:
## Tau live terminal transport proof disposition

This disposable issue was created by the fresh UI handoff command-loop terminal transport proof.

Evidence artifacts in the Tau repo working tree:

- `experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/ui-handoff-command-loop-20260628T125900Z/summary.json`
- `experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/ui-handoff-command-loop-20260628T125900Z/command-loop/command-loop-receipt.json`
- `experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/ui-handoff-command-loop-20260628T125900Z/github-transport-apply.json`

Concrete receipt fields:

- `mocked:false`
- `live:true`
- command loop `ok:true`
- selected agent `reviewer`
- terminal agent `human`
- GitHub transport `applied:true`
- GitHub transport `dry_run:false`

This closes only the disposable live terminal transport proof issue. It does not claim final Sparta Chat readiness, unbounded autonomous subagent operation, or production readiness.
Closing disposable proof issue after capturing live terminal transport evidence.
